title: Recruitment Marketing and Applicant Tracking System | Talentlyft
text:
Recruitment Marketing and Applicant Tracking System | Talentlyft

Everything you need to hire top talent in one tool. · We didn’t reinvent recruiting,  just made it easier · Built for... · High-volume hiring · Multi-location hiring · Recruiters · Blue-collar hiring · Seasonal hiring · Hard-to-fill roles · Early stage hiring · Remote hiring · Fast-growing companies · More than just a software · Integrated with 3000+ job boards · Integrated with your HR tech stack · Users love TalentLyft · What our customers say · Simple and affordable recruitment software

Everything you need to hire top talent in one tool. Try free for 14 days No credit card required. Get a demo 30 mins to explore the software. Trusted by top recruitment teams from: 4.9/5 Rated on g2 4.8/5 Rated on capterra We didn’t reinvent recruiting, just made it easier Find and hire the right people. Manage pipelines while building relationships. Auto-schedule interviews. Get granular insights that give you action points. All in one tool. Sourcing & outreach Find the right talent Source, engage, and convert passive candidates faster. With AI-powered automation, lookup tools, and email sequences you need to get to the best candidates first. Learn more Career page Employer branding Receive candidates in less than 24h Build high-converting career pages, without devs or designers. Create an irresistible company brand that stands out from the rest. Learn more Applicant tracking system Scheduling Evaluate applicants like clockwork Identify, evaluate, and send offers to candidates before your competitors. Hit the ground running and make sure top candidates come out on top. Learn more Built for... High-volume hiring Multi-location hiring Recruiters Blue-collar hiring Seasonal hiring Hard-to-fill roles Early stage hiring Remote hiring Fast-growing companies High-volume hiring Whether you're hiring one person or 200 people across different teams, TalentLyft is designed to streamline the process. Efficiently manage hundreds or even thousands of candidates through automated tasks and bulk actions. Automate entire workflows with trigger-based actions to streamline the hiring process. With Multiple Recruiting Pipelines, you can customize your hiring stages to match the specific structure of any role. Candidates can easily schedule interviews with Collective & Round Robin Self-Scheduling. Multi-location hiring Collaborate globally, hire locally: Create customized job ads to target specific regions. Build multiple careers and landing pages to attract candidates from different locations and manage them all in a single platform. Collaborate seamlessly with teams across the globe, share notes, and get real-time updates while auto-scheduling interviews across time zones. Track your hiring data through analytics, and make global recruitment not just possible, but highly efficient and coordinated. Recruiters Experience recruitment as it should be – smooth, efficient, and impactful. Advanced applicant tracking and candidate management, streamlined with automated workflows to free up your time for what really matters. Dive into our advanced search and filtering options to quickly source ideal candidates. Engage with them to build relationships, and gain insights through analytics. Evaluate effectively using scorecards and structured interviews and collaborate effortlessly with your team to make informed decisions together. Blue-collar hiring Building your teams of skilled workers? Set up your job postings and post them across 3000+ job boards and social platforms in a few clicks. Use simple and mobile-friendly application forms that reach and engage a wide range of candidates and filter out unqualified candidates with knockout questions. Use skill-based assessments and screenings to quickly identify qualified candidates and build a pool of vetted skilled workers for your future hiring needs. Seasonal hiring We get the challenges of seasonal hiring. Effortlessly assess candidates and move them through stages. Collaborate with hiring managers and other members of your team, and keep candidates informed and engaged with automated, yet personalized, communication while saving your time. Build pools of qualified candidates or the ones you already worked with, preparing for the next season (not leaving anything to chance for future seasons!). Hard-to-fill roles Use the powerful sourcing tool to find the best-fit candidates based on the criteria you set. Outreach and engage through automated email campaigns. Use your database to rediscover old candidates that fit the profile. But don't just stop there - build a brand that speaks your values with a custom careers page, set up in minutes, and have your employees spread the word with our automated referral program. Finding top talent can be a breeze - when you have the tools! Early stage hiring We get the struggle of being a start-up. We were there. And we know one thing - growth comes with the right people. That’s why we made hiring easy and effective while saving valuable time and resources. Create your first job posting, distribute it through the most popular channels, and receive your first candidate in less than 24 hours. Set up a branded careers page in minutes to start attracting candidates right away, with minimal effort. With streamlined workflows and automated actions, TalentLyft scales your hiring and grows with you, while you focus on the business! Remote hiring Attract and connect with the best talent worldwide. With automated scheduling across time zones and diverse job posting options, you'll attract and engage with top remote talent easily. Leverage a database of over 3000 job boards and channels and choose the most popular ones for every location. Collaborate with your team and make hiring decisions together with team mentions, tasks, and real-time updates. Filter the best candidates with TalentLyft’s advanced screening tools and AI-assisted assessments. Fast-growing companies TalentLyft grows with you. From finding and attracting candidates, creating and managing relationships and collaborating with your team, TalentLyft streamlines workflows while automating tasks like screening candidates, sending emails and scheduling interviews, saving you time while you scale. Manage your entire hiring process from start to finish and track your growth through analytics. Our software integrates seamlessly with other HR tools to support your growth all the way. More than just a software From fast setup to continuous support, we're with you every step of the way. Fast implementation & migration Achieve your most important goals faster with our fast implementation. Easily migrate your data from any ATS or spreadsheet. Set up everything in less than 24 hours and start optimizing right away. Learn more Training & support Tailored training for your team. We create programs based on your unique goals to help you meet objectives independently, and offer guides to enhance your team's understanding of TalentLyft whenever you need. Learn more Ongoing consultation TalentLyft's ongoing consultation offers regular checkups and continuous optimization. Our dedicated advisors provide personalized advice, effective strategies, and new features to elevate your recruitment efforts.
